panels.description: Tempo rilevato in posizione supina nell'intervallo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "supine" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed)}))

panels.title: Tempo supino

panels.description: Tempo rilevato in posizione prona nell'intervallo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "prone" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed)}))

panels.title: Tempo prono

panels.description: Tempo rilevato sul fianco destro nell'intervallo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "right_side" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed)}))

panels.title: Tempo lato destro

panels.description: Tempo rilevato sul fianco sinistro nell'intervallo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "left_side" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed)}))

panels.title: Tempo lato sinistro

panels.description: Cronologia unificata delle posizioni: consente di leggere direttamente ogni cambio durante la notte.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "position_code" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Storico delle posizioni notturne

panels.description: Riepilogo percentuale delle posizioni nell'intervallo selezionato.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id", "position"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: ["position"]) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed), position: r.position}))

panels.title: Distribuzione delle posizioni

panels.description: Tratti non classificabili con sufficiente certezza, utili per valutare qualita e transizioni.

targets.query: from(bucket: "posture") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r._field == "confidence" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}" and r.position == "unknown" and r.session_id =~ /^${session_id:regex}$/) |> group(columns: ["session_id"]) |> elapsed(unit: 1s) |> filter(fn: (r) => r.elapsed >= 0 and r.elapsed <= 10) |> group(columns: []) |> sum(column: "elapsed") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: float(v: r.elapsed)}))

panels.title: Tempo non classificato

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)
list.label: Paziente monitorato
list.name: patient_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "patient_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position", start: 0)

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "session_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}", start: 0)
list.label: Sessione notturna
list.name: session_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "posture", tag: "session_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "night_position" and r.patient_id == "${patient_id}", start: 0)
